result.query: SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name FROM entities e JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE e.entity_type = ? LIMIT 100
SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name FROM entities e JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE e.entity_type = ? LIMIT 100
SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name FROM entities e JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE e.entity_type = ? LIMIT 100
SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name FROM entities e JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE e.entity_type = ? LIMIT 100
SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name FROM entities e JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE e.entity_type = ? LIMIT 100
SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100
SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100
SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100
SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100
SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100
{ sparql(query:"SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100") { rows } }
{ sparql(query:"SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100") { rows } }
{ sparql(query:"SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100") { rows } }
{ sparql(query:"SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100") { rows } }
{ sparql(query:"SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a markdown ; rdfs:label ?label . } LIMIT 100") { rows } }

SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 100

SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 100

SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 100

SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 100

SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 100
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "kernel" . } LIMIT 100
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "kernel" . } LIMIT 100
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "kernel" . } LIMIT 100
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "kernel" . } LIMIT 100
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "kernel" . } LIMIT 100
{ search(text:"kernel", limit:100) { iri label source_name snippet } }
{ search(text:"kernel", limit:100) { iri label source_name snippet } }
{ search(text:"kernel", limit:100) { iri label source_name snippet } }

SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50

SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50

SELECT e.iri, e.label, src.name AS source_name, substr(f.text, 1, 200) AS snippet FROM fragments f JOIN entities e ON e.entity_id=f.entity_id JOIN sources src ON src.source_id=e.source_id WHERE lower(f.text) LIKE ? LIMIT 50
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "risk" . } LIMIT 50
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "risk" . } LIMIT 50
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "risk" . } LIMIT 50
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "risk" . } LIMIT 50
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "risk" . } LIMIT 50
{ search(text:"risk", limit:50) { iri label source_name snippet } }
{ search(text:"risk", limit:50) { iri label source_name snippet } }
